problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
